serviceNotes.engine oil: M57D25 EU Inspection I/II: Oil Service 15,000 km or 12 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2178-2001/service (compiled BMW six-cylinder diesel row).
serviceNotes.fuel filter: Changed from 60,000 km to 45,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2178-2001/service (BMW six-cylinder diesel fuel filter).
serviceNotes.EGR / intake clean: Diesel EGR/intake soot; ~120,000 km when needed.

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2178-2001/service — 15,000 km / 12 months (BMW 330d 3.0 diesel); M57 six-cylinder diesel family; BMW owner's manual E39 525d
serviceSources.micro filter: BMW owner's manual E39 (EU) — microfilter at Inspection II, 30,000 km
serviceSources.brake fluid: BMW owner's manual E39 — brake fluid every 24 months (DOT 4 LV)
serviceSources.air cleaner element: https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2178-2001/service — 30,000 km diesel air filter; BMW owner's manual E39 525d
serviceSources.fuel filter: Changed from 60,000 km to 45,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2178-2001/service (six-cylinder diesel fuel filter)

serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW owner's manual E39 — brake pad inspection every 15,000 km with Oil Service
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW owner's manual E39 (EU) — Inspection II / vehicle check 60,000 km
